character_dossiers.name: Squire Trelawney
character_dossiers.biography: A gentleman who stayed at the Admiral Benbow inn and was part of a group that requested the narrator to document Treasure Island's events.

character_dossiers.name: Dr. Livesey
character_dossiers.biography: A physician who visited the narrator's father and was part of the group that requested the narrator to document Treasure Island's events.

character_dossiers.name: the captain
character_dossiers.biography: A former sailor who lodged at the Admiral Benbow inn, known for his fierce demeanor, sea-chest, and stories of maritime adventures.
